title: Sam (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|disambiguating Sam|[[Sama (disambiguation)]], [[Samantha (disambiguation)]], [[Samara (disambiguation)]], [[Samuel (disambiguation)]], or [[Sammun (disambiguation)]]}}
'''Sam''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Samala Loené]]''', a [[Rebel pilot]]
*'''[[Samana spiced loaf]]''', a type of [[bread]]
*'''[[Samera Ra-oon]]''', the [[coordinator]] of the [[Republic Fair]]
*'''[[Sam Kenzie]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] rehabilitation [[officer]]
*'''[[Samm]]''', a member of the [[Ghorman Front]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Sam]]''', a [[Thief/Legends|thief]] who stole the [[Kubaz Insect]]
*'''[[Samala Reyn]]''', a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]]
*'''[[Saman]]''', a [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]]
*'''[[Samana]]''', a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]
*'''[[Samar]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]]
*'''[[Sam Brunk]]''', a [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]]
*'''[[Samdew]]''', a [[Communications officer/Legends|communications officer]]
*'''[[Samels]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]]
*'''[[Samhan Dobo]]''', a merchant
*'''[[Sam Heggs]]''', a [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]]
*'''[[Sam Ryus]]''', a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]
*'''[[Sam Saddek]]''', an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]]
*'''[[Sam Snootles]]''', a [[Pa'lowick/Legends|Pa'lowick]]
*'''[[Sam Waurie]]''', son of a [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] [[Security Division]] executive
*'''[[Sam Weller]]''', a law professional
*An [[unidentified sentient dog]] who is presumably [[Max (bunny)|Max's]] partner '''Sam''' from [[Wikipedia:Sam & Max|the Sam & Max series]]
